content: We can borrow React’s component-based UI architecture to build a modular, reusable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) framework for 2025’s swarm UAV autonomous agents, where each curiosity-driven exploration behavior is encapsulated as an interchangeable React-style component. This lets developers quickly swap, test, and recombine different curiosity modules for specific swarm exploration tasks without rebuilding the entire agent control stack.
